title: Investigate Pipeline View Filtering Out Opportunity Records
description: An opportunity record was not appearing in the pipeline view. Root cause was a close date filter set to >3 months, which excluded the record. After adjusting the close date, the opportunity appeared correctly. Filed as a knowledge-sharing ticket to give the developer exposure to this type of user-reported issue.
acceptance_criteria: Pipeline view correctly filters opportunities based on close date criteria
implementation_notes: Not a code bug. User-reported issue caused by filter configuration. Related to GTM-72.
comment_summary: Ryan self-resolved the issue — the close date filter was excluding the record. Shared the ticket for developer exposure to user-reported issues.
